# `payments` - database schema slice

Source of truth: [`backend/prisma/schema.prisma`](../../../prisma/schema.prisma).
This file mirrors the Prisma models owned by this feature so the schema is
co-located with the code that reads/writes it. Regenerate via:

```bash
pwsh backend/scripts/scaffold-feature-schemas.ps1
```

## `Payment`

```prisma
model Payment {
  id            String         @id @default(uuid())
  sessionId     String         @unique
  clientId      String
  advisorId     String
  amount        Decimal        @db.Decimal(12, 2)
  currency      String         @default("USD")
  status        String         @default("pending")
  paymentMethod String?
  transactionId String?
  description   String?
  createdAt     DateTime       @default(now())
  updatedAt     DateTime       @updatedAt
  advisor       User           @relation("Payment_advisorIdToUser", fields: [advisorId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  client        User           @relation("Payment_clientIdToUser", fields: [clientId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  session       AdvisorSession @relation(fields: [sessionId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)

  @@index([advisorId])
  @@index([clientId])
  @@index([createdAt])
  @@index([status])
  @@schema("public")
}
```
